parameters.name: horzsource
parameters.label: Horizontal Source
parameters.description: Instead of using the Red channel to displace horizontally, you can choose a different channel.

parameters.name: vertsource
parameters.label: Vertical Source
parameters.description: Instead of using the Green channel to displace vertically, you can choose a different channel.

parameters.name: aspectcorrect
parameters.label: Aspect Correct
parameters.description: When on, this will apply an aspect-correct to the displacement offset based on the source image's original aspect ratio. This is useful when working with ultrawide textures to prevent the displacement

parameters.name: uvweight
parameters.label: UV Weight
parameters.description: This reduces the influence of the pixel's position when brought toward 0. At its default of 1, it doesn't zoom into the Displace Image. When 0, it anchors the displacements relative to one pixel in th

parameters.name: offsetweight
parameters.label: Offset Weight
parameters.description: Scales the Offset parameter values. When this is 0 the Offset parameter will have no effect.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the tiles.

parameters.name: midpointy
parameters.label: Midpointy
parameters.description: This value is the color values that will result in no displacement. Values below this will cause the displacement to come from the left/bottom of the pixel, while values above this will cause the disp

parameters.name: displaceweighty
parameters.label: Displaceweighty
parameters.description: This scales the offset caused by the Displace Image. It will cause the pixels fetched to be closer/farther along the sample vector created by the Horizontal and Vertical Source.

parameters.name: offsety
parameters.label: Offsety

examples.label: Configure Vertical Source and Displaceweightx
examples.description: Common settings from 14 real Derivative examples
